transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling HealthLine Navigation. What's going on today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, um, I've had a fever and a really sore throat since yesterday. It's getting worse.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry you're feeling this way. Can you tell me your temperature and if you're having any trouble breathing?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: It's been around a hundred and one. No trouble breathing, just really achy and tired.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, that sounds like it could be a viral infection, possibly strep. It's not an emergency, but you should be seen within twenty-four hours.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, that makes sense. Do you know anyone I could see soon?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, actually Dr. Patel at Riverside Clinic has an opening tomorrow at nine fifteen for urgent same-day visits.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh perfect, can you book that for me?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can't finalize the booking on this call, but I'd recommend calling Riverside directly to confirm that slot with Dr. Patel.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Alright, I'll call them. Should I take anything in the meantime?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You can take acetaminophen for the fever and drink plenty of fluids until you're seen. If you develop trouble breathing, please seek emergency care right away.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Got it, thank you so much for your help.
